description: Reproducible, bounded, PARKED Nebius brain container/runtime manifest. Prepared this round, not launched. Bound to a code SHA, an image digest, and a model checksum, with hard call/token/time/cost ceilings and a PR-only output contract. Consumed by apps/brain/src/nebiusProvider.ts (validateNebiusManifest / NebiusBrainProvider).
